fields.description: Select the AI provider for chat completions.
fields.label: AI Provider

fields.description: API key for the selected provider. Stored encrypted.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: Model name. Defaults per provider — OpenAI: gpt-4o, Claude: claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929, Gemini: gemini-2.5-flash.
fields.label: Model

fields.description: Controls randomness (0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative).
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: Maximum tokens in the AI response.
fields.label: Max Tokens

fields.description: Maximum number of conversation messages sent as context to the AI. Older messages are trimmed. Set to 0 for unlimited.
fields.label: Max Context Messages

fields.description: Enable HR & Payroll analytics tools. Requires HRMS app to be installed.
fields.label: Enable HRMS Tools

fields.description: Enable Intelligent Document Processing — extract structured data from uploaded documents (invoices, POs, receipts) and create ERPNext records. Requires pypdf, openpyxl, and python-docx packages.
fields.label: Enable IDP Tools

fields.description: When enabled, IDP validates extracted data (required fields, link resolution, business rules) before creating records. When disabled, ERPNext handles validation during document save — this is usually sufficient as ERPNext auto-populates missing values via set_missing_values and set_item_defaults.
fields.label: Enable Strict IDP Validation

fields.description: When enabled, IDP automatically creates missing master records (Customer, Supplier, Item, UOM) from extracted data during document creation. When disabled, reports missing masters and asks the user to create them manually.
fields.label: Auto Create Missing Masters

fields.description: Enable demand forecasting, revenue projection, cash flow forecasting, and anomaly detection tools. Uses statistical methods (no external ML dependencies required).
fields.label: Enable Predictive Tools

fields.description: Allow the AI assistant to create and update records in ERPNext (e.g. create leads, update opportunity status). The AI will always ask for confirmation before making changes.
fields.label: Enable Write Operations

fields.description: Enable multi-agent orchestration for complex queries. When enabled, complex queries are automatically decomposed into sub-tasks and executed step-by-step by specialized agents. This uses additional LLM calls and tokens but produces more comprehensive analysis for multi-dimensional queries.
fields.label: Enable Agent Orchestration

fields.description: Default number of records returned by tools. Set to 0 to use system default (20).
fields.label: Default Query Limit

fields.description: Default limit for ranking/top-N tools (e.g. top customers, top debtors). Set to 0 to use system default (10).
fields.label: Default Top-N Limit

fields.description: Maximum number of records any tool can return, regardless of requested limit.
fields.label: Max Query Limit

fields.description: Custom AI persona description. Leave blank for default: 'an intelligent ERPNext business assistant'.
fields.label: AI Persona

fields.description: Preferred language for AI responses.
fields.label: Response Language
fields.options:
English
Hindi
Spanish
French
German
Portuguese
Arabic
Chinese
Japanese
Korean

fields.description: Additional system prompt instructions appended to the default prompt. Use this for domain-specific or company-specific guidelines.
fields.label: Custom System Prompt

fields.description: Additional behavioral instructions for the AI assistant (e.g. tone, formatting preferences).
fields.label: Custom Instructions

fields.description: Enable real-time token streaming for AI responses. When enabled, responses are delivered word-by-word via WebSocket instead of waiting for the full response.
fields.label: Enable Streaming

fields.description: Master toggle for scheduled reports. When disabled, no automation tasks will run.
fields.label: Enable Automation
